mapper.select: SELECT * FROM info_teacher WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO info_teacher(user_id, teacher_no, name, gender, contact, title, create_time, del_flag) VALUES(#{userId}, #{teacherNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{contact}, #{title}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE info_teacher SET del_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
